title: Murder Drones Plushies
description: Totems of undying are now adorable plushies from that awesome indie-show!!!!
body:
# Totems to Plushies!
![Showcase2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a95df909cac85da2f87e5ca47696063a5d2501e.gif)

You can now create various awesome Murder Drones plushies if you rename totem of undying on anvil to "**V**", "**J**", "**N**", "**uzi**", or "**cyn**".

⚠️ From 1.21.5 it is VANILLA FEATURE (!!!), no mods needed.

⚠️ This thing will NOT work with other similar totem-of-undying-renaming resource packs. Only the prioritized one will.
